ddls:
CREATE TABLE "utilities" (
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility company */,
  "utility_name" TEXT /* Name of the utility company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the utility company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the utility company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the utility company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the utility company's website */,
  "service_area" TEXT /* Description of the service area covered by the utility company */,
  "customer_support_phone" TEXT /* Dedicated phone number for customer support */,
  "customer_support_email" TEXT /* Dedicated email address for customer support */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company offering the tariff */,
  "tariff_name" TEXT /* Name of the tariff */,
  "tariff_type" TEXT /* Type of tariff (e.g., TOU, demand charge) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the tariff becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the tariff expires */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tariff */,
  "min_usage" REAL /* Minimum usage threshold for the tariff */,
  "max_usage" REAL /* Maximum usage threshold for the tariff */,
  "tiered_rates" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tariff has tiered rates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariffs_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariff_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tariff the rate belongs to */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., energy charge, demand charge) */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the rate */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rate period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rate period */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the rate is applicable */,
  "rate_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariff_rates_tariff_id FOREIGN KEY ("tariff_id") REFERENCES tariffs ("tariff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company serving the customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "service_address" TEXT /* Address where the service is provided */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer owning the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Date of the billing cycle */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_data" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the usage */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy used */,
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tariff applied to the usage */,
  "meter_reading" REAL /* Meter reading at the time of usage */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of meter used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customer_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_tariff_id FOREIGN KEY ("tariff_id") REFERENCES tariffs ("tariff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_data" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the bill */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date of the bill */,
  "bill_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the bill is due */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee amount if the bill is not paid on time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_data_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customer_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES billing_data ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company serving the zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the zip code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State associated with the zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility company serving the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the time zone */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_zones_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
